a:r.a:t: Identify high-potential accounts and pricing opportunities
Assess how to capture the identified opportunity
and translate into clear, sequenced action plan
equip the organization for sustained, measurable growth
The discovery phase provides a top-down opportunity sizing with prioritized levers and a roadmap to execution
Bi-weekly steering committee meetings will be held throughout the process to maintain consistent progress syndication, thought partnership, and course correction between [Client] and McKinsey
